query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_march, COUNT(CASE WHEN YEAR(dteNewListing) = 2026 AND MONTH(dteNewListing) = 3 THEN 1 END) as march_listings FROM properfyProperties WHERE companyId = 'company_1766331506068' AND dteNewListing IS NOT NULL;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3eAQdaRY4zkjYsC.95a35ec57269 --database FWQUTMFHrecTsndnoBiUKo --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total_march, COUNT(CASE WHEN YEAR(dteNewListing) = 2026 AND MONTH(dteNewListing) = 3 THEN 1 END) as march_listings FROM properfyProperties WHERE companyId = 'company_1766331506068' AND dteNewListing IS NOT NULL;
